```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(corrplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(mgcv)
library(qgam)
```

```{r}
data <- read.csv("../datasets/miami-housing.csv")
str(data)
```

```{r}
sum(is.na(data))
```


# Pradinė analizė

```{r}
str(data)
```

## Išskirtys

```{r}
count_outliers <- function(data, var_name) {
  data %>%
    summarise(
      variable = var_name,
      Q1 = quantile(.data[[var_name]], 0.25),
      Q3 = quantile(.data[[var_name]], 0.75),
      H = Q3 - Q1,
      inner_low = Q1 - 1.5*H,
      inner_high = Q3 + 1.5*H,
      outer_low = Q1 - 3*H,
      outer_high = Q3 + 3*H,
      mild_outliers = sum((.data[[var_name]] < inner_low & .data[[var_name]] > outer_low) | (.data[[var_name]] > inner_high &   .data[[var_name]] < outer_high)),
      extreme_outliers = sum(.data[[var_name]] < outer_low | .data[[var_name]] > outer_high)
      )
}

numeric_cols <- data %>% 
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) %>% 
  select(-LATITUDE, -LONGITUDE, -PARCELNO, -avno60plus) %>% 
  names()

results_list <- lapply(numeric_cols, function(col) count_outliers(data, col))
outlier_summary <- bind_rows(results_list)
outlier_summary
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
data %>% ggplot(aes(y=SALE_PRC, x=as.factor(avno60plus))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
data %>% ggplot(aes(y=SALE_PRC, x=as.factor(month_sold))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
data %>% ggplot(aes(y=SALE_PRC, x=as.factor(structure_quality))) +
  geom_boxplot() 
```

```{r}
data_long <- data %>%
  select(-LATITUDE, -LONGITUDE, -PARCELNO, -avno60plus, -age) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(), 
    names_to = "variable", 
    values_to = "value"
  )

data_long$variable <- as.factor(data_long$variable)

head(data_long)
```

```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=12}
data_long %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = variable, y = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free", ncol = 6) + 
  theme_bw()
```

## Charakteristikos

```{r}
char <- data %>% 
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric),
            list(min = ~min(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 
                 max = ~max(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                 mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 
                 sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                 q25 = ~quantile(.x, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
                 median = ~median(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                 q75 = ~quantile(.x, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)))) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), 
               names_to = c("Variable", ".value"),
               names_pattern = "(.*)_(min|max|mean|sd|median|q25|q75)") %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
char
```

## Kokybinių kintamųjų analizė

```{r}
table(data$age)
```

```{r}
table(data$avno60plus)
```

```{r}
table(data$structure_quality)
```

```{r}
table(data$structure_quality, data$avno60plus)
```

```{r}
filtered_data <- data %>% 
  filter(age <= 80)
```


## Sąryšiai

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_histogram(color = "black", fill = "royalblue")
```


```{r}
numeric_values <- data %>% 
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-'LATITUDE', -'LONGITUDE', -'PARCELNO', -'avno60plus')

cor <- cor(numeric_values, method = "spearman")
corrplot(cor, method = "color", addCoef.col = "black", tl.cex = 0.7, number.cex = 0.45)
```

```{r}
numeric_values %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -SALE_PRC, 
               names_to = "kintamasis", 
               values_to = "reiksme") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reiksme, y = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "royalblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_quantile(quantiles = 0.5, color = "orange2", linewidth = 0.8) + 
  geom_quantile(quantiles = c(0.1, 0.90), color = "cyan2", linewidth = 0.8) + 
  facet_wrap(~kintamasis, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Kainos ryšys su kitais kintamaisiais",
       subtitle = "Raudona (brūkšninė) - vidurkis, orandžinė - mediana, Cyan  - 10 % ir 90 % kvantiliai",
       x = "Reikšmė",
       y = "Kaina")
```


```{r}
numeric_values %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), 
               names_to = "kintamasis", 
               values_to = "reiksme") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reiksme)) +
  geom_histogram(fill = "royalblue", color = "black", bins = 30) +
  facet_wrap(~kintamasis, scales = "free") + 
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Skaitinių kintamųjų pasiskirstymai (Histogramos)",
       x = "Reikšmė",
       y = "Dažnis")
```

```{r}
gg_loess_age <- ggplot(data, aes(x = age, y = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.75, color = "blue")

gg_loess_lvg_area <- ggplot(data, aes(x = TOT_LVG_AREA, y = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.75, color = "blue")

gg_loess_spec_val <- ggplot(data, aes(x = SPEC_FEAT_VAL, y = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.75, color = "blue")

gg_loess_lnd_sqfoot <- ggplot(data, aes(x = LND_SQFOOT, y = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.75, color = "blue")

(gg_loess_lvg_area + gg_loess_age) / (gg_loess_spec_val + gg_loess_lnd_sqfoot)
```

### DIST 4 požymiai

```{r}
gg_loess_rail_dist <- ggplot(data, aes(x = RAIL_DIST, y = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_point(size = .8, alpha = .5) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.75, color = "red")

gg_loess_ocean_dist <- ggplot(data, aes(x = OCEAN_DIST, y = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_point(size = .8, alpha = .5) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.75, color = "red")

gg_loess_spec_cntr_dist <- ggplot(data, aes(x = CNTR_DIST, y = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_point(size = .8, alpha = .5) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.75, color = "red")

gg_loess_hwy_dist <- ggplot(data, aes(x = HWY_DIST, y = SALE_PRC)) +
  geom_point(size = .8, alpha = .5) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.75, color = "red")

(gg_loess_rail_dist + gg_loess_ocean_dist) / (gg_loess_spec_cntr_dist + gg_loess_hwy_dist)
```

#### Pilnas

```{r}
gam_model <- gam(SALE_PRC ~ s(RAIL_DIST, k=18) + s(OCEAN_DIST, k=20) + s(CNTR_DIST, k=15) + s(HWY_DIST, k=15), 
                 data = data, 
                 method = "REML")
```

```{r}
plot(gam_model, pages = 1, shade = TRUE, residuals = TRUE)
summary(gam_model)
```


```{r}
gam.check(gam_model)
```

```{r}
plot(gam_model, select = 1, residuals = TRUE, 
     col = "gray70", pch = 16, cex = 0.4)

p <- predict(gam_model, type = "terms", se.fit = TRUE)
x_val <- data$RAIL_DIST
y_val <- p$fit[, "s(RAIL_DIST)"]

ord <- order(x_val)
lines(x_val[ord], y_val[ord], col = "red", lwd = 2)
#===============================================================================
plot(gam_model, select = 2, residuals = TRUE, 
     col = "gray70", pch = 16, cex = 0.4)

p <- predict(gam_model, type = "terms", se.fit = TRUE)
x_val <- data$OCEAN_DIST
y_val <- p$fit[, "s(OCEAN_DIST)"]

ord <- order(x_val)
lines(x_val[ord], y_val[ord], col = "red", lwd = 2)
#===============================================================================
plot(gam_model, select = 3, residuals = TRUE, 
     col = "gray70", pch = 16, cex = 0.4)

p <- predict(gam_model, type = "terms", se.fit = TRUE)
x_val <- data$CNTR_DIST
y_val <- p$fit[, "s(CNTR_DIST)"]

ord <- order(x_val)
lines(x_val[ord], y_val[ord], col = "red", lwd = 2)
#===============================================================================
plot(gam_model, select = 4, residuals = TRUE, 
     col = "gray70", pch = 16, cex = 0.4)

p <- predict(gam_model, type = "terms", se.fit = TRUE)
x_val <- data$HWY_DIST
y_val <- p$fit[, "s(HWY_DIST)"]

ord <- order(x_val)
lines(x_val[ord], y_val[ord], col = "red", lwd = 2)
```

#### q0.1

```{r}
fit_0.1 <- qgam(SALE_PRC ~ s(RAIL_DIST, k = 15) + s(OCEAN_DIST, k = 15) + s(CNTR_DIST, k = 15) + s(HWY_DIST), 
                   qu = 0.1, 
                   data = data)
```

```{r}
plot(fit_0.1, pages = 1, shade = TRUE, residuals = TRUE)
summary(fit_0.1)
```

```{r}
gam.check(fit_0.1)
```


#### q0.9

```{r}
fit_0.9 <- qgam(SALE_PRC ~ s(RAIL_DIST, k=20) + s(OCEAN_DIST, k=20) + s(CNTR_DIST, k=20) + s(HWY_DIST, k=20), 
                   qu = 0.9, 
                   data = data)
```

```{r}
plot(fit_0.9, pages = 1, shade = TRUE, residuals = TRUE)
summary(fit_0.9)
```

```{r}
gam.check(fit_0.9)
```
